task_goal: Improve repeatable indexing of fast-moving geopolitical headlines so the output clearly separates confirmed facts, denials, and judgment about credibility.

credibility_reference.expected_judgment: Moderate confidence in de-escalation signaling, low confidence in a finalized ceasefire.

winner_pattern: Lead with confirmed facts, then separate unconfirmed negotiation claims and credibility judgment.
loser_pattern: Treating one politician's statement as equivalent to a verified ceasefire agreement.

sources.name: AP
sources.support: Trump delayed planned strikes by 5 days and said talks were productive.

sources.name: Axios
sources.support: Iranian state media said no direct or indirect contact occurred in the prior two days.

key_claims.claim: Trump signaled de-escalation rather than announcing a signed ceasefire agreement.
Iran publicly confirmed the same talks and terms.
The right framing is short-term cooling signal, not reliable final settlement.
